scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "yarn workspace cashflow-backend run dev" "yarn workspace frontend run dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace cashflow-backend run build && yarn workspace frontend run build
scripts.test: yarn workspace cashflow-backend run test && yarn workspace cashflow-backend run test:integration && yarn workspace frontend run test
scripts.ci: yarn workspace cashflow-backend run typecheck && yarn workspace cashflow-backend run test && yarn workspace cashflow-backend run test:integration && yarn workspace cashflow-backend run build && yarn workspace frontend run test && yarn workspace frontend run build
